name: hister-queen-edition
description: Juego web estático tipo Hitster inspirado en Queen.

scripts.test: npm run validate:catalog && npm run check:js
scripts.check:js: node --check js/app.js && node --check js/catalog.js && node --check js/session.js && node --check js/playlist.js && node --check js/qr-renderer.js && node --check js/diagnostics.js && node --check js/print-cards.js && node --check data.js && node --check scripts/validate-catalog.js && node --check scripts/validate-previews.js && node --check sw.js
